notes: catalogCount = rows in catalog.json only. effectiveCountAfterScopedGold = catalog slice merged with prependScopedGoldCatalogLessons (Launch Wave 1 added 14 scoped-gold slugs in code; registry total 26 injectables when pathway returns getFullLesson). Run: npm run audit:pathway-lessons. Canada NP (ca-np-cnple) remains waitlist; scoped providers return null → effective 0 until content exists.

pathways.label: US RN — NCLEX-RN
pathways.scopeNotes: US acute care language; NGN-style clinical judgment emphasis.

pathways.label: Canada RN — NCLEX-RN
pathways.scopeNotes: Canadian units, acute care language; do not mix US-only scope statements.

pathways.label: US LVN/LPN — NCLEX-PN
pathways.scopeNotes: NCLEX-PN vocational scope: delegation, safety, ordered care — not RN-level leadership disguised as PN.

pathways.label: Canada RPN — REx-PN
pathways.scopeNotes: REx-PN / Canadian PN regulatory context; paired adaptation from US PN where appropriate, not copy-paste.

pathways.label: US NP — FNP (primary US NP track)
pathways.scopeNotes: Board-level advanced practice: assessment → diagnosis → plan → evaluation; lifespan FNP, not RN tasks.

pathways.label: Canada NP — CNPLE track
pathways.scopeNotes: Pathway status upcoming/waitlist; author Canadian NP scope as requirements stabilize — do not mirror US FNP verbatim.

duplicateRisk.catalogDuplicateSlugsWithinPathway: none detected (slug keys unique per pathway)
duplicateRisk.pairedPathwayStrategy: US/CA RN share 95 slugs (country-adapted pairs). US LPN / CA RPN share 34 slugs; remainder are track-specific.
duplicateRisk.lowValueLessonPolicy: Do not add lessons with <3 substantive sections or duplicate titles; use pathway-lesson-premium gate and structural quality checks before publish.

domainFramework.description: Map new lessons using topicSlug + PathwayLessonSectionKind (intro, labs_diagnostics, nursing_assessment_interventions, etc.) and exam_focus blocks. Align volume across:
domainFramework.nclexRnPnTopicBuckets: Reuse existing catalog topicSlug clusters (e.g. cardiovascular, pharmacology, mental-health, leadership, maternity, pediatrics) and add net-new slugs only when a domain is underrepresented vs targets below.
domainFramework.npTopicBuckets: Expand fnp-us-lesson-enrichment lanes (lifespan × clinical domain); each new lesson must tag primaryLifespan + domains for hub filters.

us-rn-nclex-rn.priorityGaps: Balance thin buckets: musculoskeletal, musculoskeletal-adjacent MSK procedures; expand pharmacology + safety cross-links; add explicit delegation vs leadership where stems demand it.

ca-rn-nclex-rn.priorityGaps: Mirror US RN gap list with Canada-specific copy; ensure SI units and provincial language in country_specific_notes.

us-lpn-nclex-pn.priorityGaps: Large lift: double PN-specific content in coordinated-care, delegation, safety, mental-health; avoid duplicating RN depth in leadership.

ca-rpn-rex-pn.priorityGaps: Parallel US LPN count with REx-PN scope overlays; 27 lessons differ by slug from US PN today — expand Canada-only scenarios.

us-np-fnp.priorityGaps: Major expansion: differential diagnosis, prescribing, chronic disease panels per lifespan; case-based exam_focus on each high-yield NP topic.

ca-np-cnple.priorityGaps: Greenfield: start from Canadian NP competency map when published; seed 20–30 foundational lessons before scaling to 150.

expansionPlan500.phaseA: 150 launch: close gaps in table above; enforce one lesson = one primary learning objective; paired US/CA adaptation workflow.
expansionPlan500.phaseB: 150–250: deepen medications + labs_diagnostics density; add case_study template lessons per Client Needs / NP domain.
expansionPlan500.phaseC: 250–400: sub-specialty clusters (e.g. OB high-risk, peds infectious, geriatrics polypharmacy) without duplicating titles.
expansionPlan500.phaseD: 400–500+: maintenance cadence — retire or merge thin duplicates; A/B hub analytics for low-engagement slugs.
